_comment: Copy the values below into environment variables (or appsettings.Development.json, which is gitignored) — never commit real secrets to appsettings.json. ASP.NET Core maps env vars using double underscores for nesting, e.g. JwtSettings__SecretKey.

JwtSettings.SecretKey: <generate a random 256-bit+ key; must match the key the Node.js Admin API uses to validate tokens>

SmtpSettings.Password: <SMTP app password — use a dedicated transactional-email provider in production instead of a personal Gmail app password>
